text.title: django-decision-tree Decision Tree
text.summary: The architecture decision tree itself: framework → API → layering → DB → deployment.

decision-tree.root-question: Score on five Django-fit signals (admin / ORM / SSR / accounts / forms): how many apply?

branch.question: DRF or Ninja or vanilla Django views?

branch.conclusion: framework="fastapi" (API-only) or "flask" (lightweight). Skip the rest of the Django tree.
Consider "django-ninja-only" — Django ORM + admin but Ninja for the API layer.

branch.question: Model count + team size + bounded contexts?

text.example: signals: {needs_admin=true, needs_orm=true, needs_ssr=false, needs_accounts=true, needs_forms=true} → score=4 q-framework -> >= 4 (django) q-api -> 'existing-drf-or-complex-perms' (team familiar) => api_stack=drf models=12 → '10-50 models' => layering=service-layer
